title: Must maintain dignity: Gujarat High Court on IIT student's attire in court
description: The Gujarat High Court on Monday took exception to the attire of a young girl student from Indian Institute of Technology-Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) who was present in court for the hearing of her case [Samraggi Debroy v. The Director of IIT Gandhinagar & Anr.]While personal choice cannot be curtailed, it must still conform to the dignity and decorum of the forum, Justice Nirzar S Desai said.Justice Desai drew a distinction between personal liberty in dressing and appropriateness in a cou
